name: Vapi
description: Voice AI platform for building production phone agents. Handles real-time STT, TTS, turn-taking, and LLM orchestration. Scalable to millions of concurrent calls.

skills.name: Build production voice agents for inbound and outbound phone calls with sub-500ms latency
skills.description: Build production voice agents for inbound and outbound phone calls with sub-500ms latency

skills.name: Clone custom voices or choose from dozens of built-in TTS providers per call
skills.description: Clone custom voices or choose from dozens of built-in TTS providers per call

skills.name: Record, transcribe, and analyze every call with structured JSON summaries
skills.description: Record, transcribe, and analyze every call with structured JSON summaries

skills.name: Route calls to different LLMs and prompts based on caller intent and context
skills.description: Route calls to different LLMs and prompts based on caller intent and context

skills.name: Launch outbound call campaigns targeting thousands of numbers with parallel dialing
skills.description: Launch outbound call campaigns targeting thousands of numbers with parallel dialing
